title: Simply Optimized Forked
description: An unofficial continuation of Simply Optimized, maintaining the no-bloat, bleeding-edge performance while improving and iterating upon it
body: ![Simply Optimized Forked Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/610043f1785539291a52ab5affb579b0382e7267.png) [](https://codeberg.org/Nostalgica-Reverie/Content-Monorepo) [](https://discord.com/invite/PD7UrU38H2) [](https://fabricmc.net/) [](https://www.patreon.com/ViolaFlower) ## Information Simply Optimized Forked is a continuation of the now discontinued Simply Optimized! Additionally on top of providing what the pack used to, it now will also provide LTS support for certain Minecraft versions (currently 1.20.1 and 1.21.1) and come with minor fixes for reoccuring issues found on the original pack ## Philosophy Simply Optimized provided access to bleeding edge Minecraft performance, without any bloat via tuned configs and plenty of testing. Our fork will abide by the same principles as the original modpack. SO Forked will also be available as an open source Packwiz project on Codeberg. ## What Simply Optimized Forked does SO Forked improves upon Simply Optimized by fixing a few common user complaints, and providing additional support. Our current differences include: - CurseForge Support - LTS Support for Minecraft 1.20.1 and 1.21.1, along with latest support. We may do mulit-loader in the future - Some specific performance mods have been added, which were not in the original SO due to a variety of reasons (i.e. ParticleCore being excluded due to it having multiple dependencies) - User Options will not be overriden each modpack update (same as [Simply Optimized: Options Respected](https://modrinth.com/modpack/so-or)) ## Credits - [hsza](https://modrinth.com/user/hsza) for making the original Simply Optimized - [omo50](https://modrinth.com/user/rjxkenshin) for maintaining this fork - [Cjnator38](https://modrinth.com/user/Cjnator38) for providing branding (based on the original Simply Optimized branding)
